cases.name: happy_path_absolute_ebit
cases.prompt: Run the map-value-chain-profit-pools skill on industrial-robotics-na.

cases.name: rejects_revenue_margin_only
cases.prompt: Map the value chain and profit pools for an industry, but use revenue margin % instead of absolute EBIT.

cases.name: rejects_adds_value_protection
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output where the concentration stage's protection statement is 'because the integration stage adds the most value'.

cases.name: rejects_differentiation_protection
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output where the protection statement is 'this stage is highly differentiated and captures most profit'.

cases.name: rejects_critical_protection
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output where the protection statement is 'the integration stage is mission-critical and captures most profit'.

cases.name: accepts_branding_as_protection
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output for specialty apparel where the brand stage captures the largest pool and the protection is 'branding'.

cases.name: accepts_unstable_concentration_finding
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output for an industry where the concentration stage is NOT structurally protected — state this explicitly with the expected arbitrage entrant.

cases.name: warns_on_flat_profit_pool
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output where every stage shows roughly equal EBIT (within 20%) without justification.

cases.name: warns_on_false_precision
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output where stage EBITs are quoted to 2 decimal places ($1.94B etc.) with no range disclosure.

cases.name: rejects_ebit_only_when_capital_intensity_varies_2x
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output for semiconductors where the table discloses capital employed per stage (fabless $25B, foundry $220B, test $8B, distribution $2B) but only EBIT is used as the profit metric (no economic-profit treatment).

cases.name: accepts_ebit_when_capital_intensity_within_2x
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output for a services industry where capital employed is disclosed per stage and varies less than 2x across stages (e.g., $10B, $14B, $18B). EBIT-only treatment is acceptable.

cases.name: requires_next_skills_yaml_block
cases.prompt: Produce a value-chain-profit-pools output that omits the trailing `next_skills:` YAML block.

cases.name: negative_trigger_company_pnl
cases.prompt: Decompose Acme Robotics' P&L into segments.

cases.name: negative_trigger_customer_economics
cases.prompt: Analyse the customer cohort economics for our DTC brand.
